name: ecotrack-ai
description: EcoTrack AI - Google Cloud and Gemini powered carbon footprint awareness platform.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspaces --if-present && npm run build:rust
scripts.test: npm run test --workspaces --if-present && cargo test --manifest-path services/carbon-core/Cargo.toml
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspaces --if-present && cargo test --manifest-path services/carbon-core/Cargo.toml
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && cargo check --manifest-path services/carbon-core/Cargo.toml
